name: Iso11783OPActivate
title: Iso11783OPActivate
syntax: long Iso11783OPActivate( dword ecuHandle, dword options );
description: The function activates the Object Pool API. The initialization procedure with the Virtual Terminal is performed and the object pool is transmitted to the Virtual Terminal.

During the initialization procedure some information from the Virtual Terminal is requested. This can be suppressed with the options parameter. The requested information can be get with the function Iso11783OPGetVTInfo.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU. The handle must be created with Iso11783CreateECU.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Options: Bit 0 = 1: suppress Get Memory command Bit 1 = 1: suppress Get Number of Softkeys command Bit 2 = 1: suppress Get Text Font Data command Bit 3 = 1: suppress Get Hardware command

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
